title: Crop & Foliage Variations
description: 🌾This pack makes foliage and crops have different colors and height, making farms way nicer to look at. 🪷Also has lilypad and grass variation.
body:
## The downloads are split into two versions - crop & foliage, in case you dont want some of the features.

### 🌽Crop Variation


Wheat, potatoes, carrots and beetroot crops have randomized heights and lighter & darker textures. 

These changes make big fields look better and more natural.


### 🌹Foliage Variation

Grass, Tall Grass and Fern have darker and shorter variants.

Lily pad has 4 variants and one of them has a flower on it.

Dandelions have 2 variations, because I was considering adding variations for the flowers, but decided not to.

---

**Q:** Does this resource pack require Optifine or other mods?

**A:** Nope! Its all vanilla.
